column1: # Owner: Jane. Trigger: weapon at level 8 + paired passive at level 8, then OPEN A CHEST.
# Chests drop from elites. The evolved weapon replaces the base one in the same slot.
# This is the payoff moment of the run: flash the screen white for one frame.
# The evolved STATS live in weapons.tsv as level 9 (one evolution per weapon, so
# the mapping is 1:1 and needs no schema). Icons: cards/evolutions/<into_id>.

column5: bands on BOTH sides, always, no facing check
the ring ignites the floor it passes over
8 motes; they orbit outward and return
